_description: Concise structured characterization of representative games for validation, derived from docs/PROJECT*.md analysis logs

Super_Mario_Bros.triangle_character: legato bass, 144-1152 ticks (9-72 frames), CC11=127 always
Super_Mario_Bros.defining_quality: Identical envelope and duration on every note; perception of rhythm comes entirely from volume decay, not note length

Castlevania.duration_character: highly varied, 1-frame grace notes to 1s+ sustains, avg 184 ticks (11.5 frames, 191ms) Pulse 1
Castlevania.duty_behavior: active changes mid-song (13 CC12 on P1, 19 on P2), uses all 4 duty values on P2
Castlevania.noise_character: heavy, 468 events, two velocity levels (64 strong, 48 ghost), mostly <50ms
Castlevania.defining_quality: Low starting velocity with fast decay creates sharp percussive articulation; wide duration range gives dynamic contrast between staccato bursts and legato phrases

Mega_Man_2.duration_character: Pulse 2 arpeggio engine: 2294 notes avg 1.5 frames (25ms); Pulse 1 melody avg 5.5 frames (92ms)
Mega_Man_2.duty_behavior: active changes (17 CC12 on P1, 14 on P2), cycles 12.5%/25%/50%
Mega_Man_2.noise_character: dense, 675 events, two velocity levels (80 standard, 120 accented), avg 48ms
Mega_Man_2.triangle_character: punchy staccato bass, avg 4.7 frames (79ms), locks with drum patterns
Mega_Man_2.defining_quality: Rapid 1-frame arpeggio engine on Pulse 2 creates illusion of harmony on monophonic channel; 91% of P2 notes under 50ms

Metroid.duration_character: very long atmospheric, avg 613 ticks (38.3 frames, 637ms) Pulse 1, zero notes under 100ms
Metroid.defining_quality: Volume oscillates up AND down within a single note creating a breathing effect impossible to reproduce with standard ADSR; Pulse 2 retriggering decay creates pulsing rhythm

Contra.envelope_type: wide-range attack transient with gradual 7-step tail
Contra.duration_character: moderate, 62% of P1 notes in 100-200ms range, avg 260 ticks (16.3 frames, 271ms)
Contra.duty_behavior: sparse deliberate shifts (8 CC12 on P1, 2 on P2), 50% to 75% for power chords
Contra.noise_character: none in MIDI extraction (game uses DPCM samples at $FC00)
Contra.triangle_character: fast rhythmic staccato bass, avg 5.7 frames (94ms), 83% under 100ms
Contra.defining_quality: Massive 127>51 attack transient immediately pulling back defines Contra's aggressive punch; widest velocity range (8-127) in the library
